content:
Input: dataset \(\mathcal{D}\) target policy \(\pi\) , number of iterations \(T_{1},T_{2},T_{3}\) , mini-batch size \(N\) , target_update_rate.   
# Train the encoder-decoder.   
for \(t = 1\) to \(T_{1}\) do Sample mini-batch of \(N\) transitions \((s,a,r,s^{\prime})\) from \(\mathcal{D}\) . \(\min_{\phi ,D_{s^{\prime}},D_a,D_r}\lambda_{s^{\prime}}(D_{s^{\prime}}(\phi (s,a)) - s^{\prime})^{2} + \lambda_{a}(D_{a}(\phi (s,a)) - a)^{2} + \lambda_{r}(D_{r}(\phi (s,a)) - r)^{2}.\)   
end for   
# Train the successor representation.   
for \(t = 1\) to \(T_{2}\) do Sample mini-batch of \(N\) transitions \((s,a,r,s^{\prime})\) from \(\mathcal{D}\) Sample \(a^\prime \sim \pi (s^\prime)\) \(\mathrm{min}_{\psi^{\pi}}(\phi (s,a) + \gamma \psi '(s',a') - \psi^{\pi}(s,a))^2\) If \(t\) mod target_update_rate \(= 0\) .. \(\psi^{\prime}\gets \psi\)   
end for   
# Learn w.   
for \(t = 1\) to \(T_{3}\) do Sample mini-batch of \(N\) transitions \((s,a,r,s^{\prime})\) from \(\mathcal{D}\) Sample mini-batch of \(N\) start states \(s_0\) from \(\mathcal{D}\) Sample \(a_0\sim \pi (s_0)\) \(\mathrm{min}_{\mathbf{w}}\frac{1}{2} (\mathbf{w}^{\top}\boldsymbol {\phi}(s,a))^2 -(1 - \gamma)\mathbf{w}^{\top}\boldsymbol{\psi}^{\pi}(s_0,a_0).\)   
end for
